response.overview: In rural Texas, a driver embarks on a solitary road trip where she is overcome with memories of her past relationship, each one represented in various degrees of reality. These flashbacks eventually bleed into her present as she is forced to confront her ex.
response.tagline: A woman on a road trip is confronted by a series of surrealist vignettes recounting a tumultuous relationship with her ex-girlfriend.
response.title: Moticos
